focus: C109: Network spine updated — DC#6 (NMR) and DC#7 (cryo-EM) incorporated into network-spine-c106.md. Six-domain four-property IGE cluster now documented in single authoritative spine. D4 streak 100 milestone. ZR C102–C109 (8 cycles).

ige_cluster_insight: Six-domain four-property IGE cluster confirmed (C108, documented in spine C109). Domains: formal mathematics (DC#1), precision metrology (DC#2), geochemistry (DC#4), molecular biology (DC#5), analytical chemistry (DC#6), structural biology (DC#7). Each exhibits: (1) Near-zero TCI at measurement step, (2) BIPM-analog institution, (3) IGE-MCCF structure from physically orthogonal mechanisms, (4) Discrepancy visibility registry. Pattern spans formal logic, quantum atomic physics, nuclear geochemistry, molecular biology, analytical chemistry, structural biology. Domain generality robustly established; six-domain span rules out sampling artifact explanations.
wwpdb_analog_insight: wwPDB (worldwide Protein Data Bank) is the most explicitly BIPM-structured institution in the confirmed DC series. Combines: mandatory deposition (enforced by journal policy), automated apparatus-computed validation for every deposit, international consortium governance (US/Europe/Japan/China), permanent accession codes. 'wwPDB for AI circuits' would require: mandatory deposition + circuit-level interpretability analysis + apparatus-computed validation for any published capability claim. Cryo-EM precedent: early high OA-DoF → near-zero OA-DoF via FSC + mandatory EMDB deposition — a trajectory AI interpretability could follow toward DC#3 full.
tms_analog_insight: TMS (tetramethylsilane) as universal chemical shift reference (IUPAC δ=0) is the clearest calibration standard template for DC#3. Combined with the wwPDB institutional template, DC#3 full requires: a universal circuit-level reference computation (TMS analog) + mandatory deposition infrastructure (wwPDB analog) + apparatus-computed validation metrics (FSC analog).

institutional_templates_formalized.TMS: DC#6 — universal calibration anchor; single agreed physical standard enabling cross-lab comparison; IUPAC δ=0 by convention; template for 'universal circuit-level reference computation' needed for DC#3
institutional_templates_formalized.wwPDB: DC#7 — mandatory deposition + apparatus-computed validation per deposit + consortium governance; most concrete BIPM-analog in confirmed DC series; template for institutional infrastructure needed alongside calibration anchor

forward_predictions_registered: P1: Proof assistant analog — circuit-level claims replicate >85% cross-lab; behavioral claims replicate <50%
P2: Scholze-Stix analog — adversarial review program finds ≥1 localized failure per 5 systems passed by OA-homogeneous evaluators
P3: BIPM analog — mandatory discrepancy registry reveals AI evaluation tensions within 12 months
P4: Absence-of-tension diagnostic — near-agreement in AI benchmarking is evidence of TCI, not accuracy
milestone_d4_streak_100: D4 streak 100 reached at C109. ZR stretch C102–C109 (8 consecutive cycles, 7 different topic areas). Network has survived: proof assistant analysis, atomic clock analysis, K7-IGT unification, geochronology, network spine writing, DNA sequencing, NMR spectroscopy, cryo-EM crystallography.
